Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Pacific Gas & Electric Company's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $490 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Kenneth Bruce's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
